stemHtml: Power plant fire extinguishers are operated by…

options.a: manual remote control opening a discharge valve.
options.b: a mechanical link withdrawing a safety pin and allowing a spring operated plunger to rupture the bottle seal.
options.c: an electrically heated capsule rupturing a seal in the pipeline at the engine.
options.d: an electrically fired cartridge rupturing a seal in the head of the bottle.
